## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the workflow that's
currently difficult or impossible.

## Proposed solution

What would you like Graphenium to do?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've tried or thought about.

## Would this help AI coding assistants?

Graphenium's focus is structural memory for AI coding agents. Does
this feature improve that workflow?
